user_query: I am planning a surprise party for my friend who is a crypto enthusiast. Can you suggest some coins that I can use as a theme for the party? Additionally, I would like to explore the latest nft prices. Can you also provide me with the list of trending profiles in the crypto market?

TaskList.description: Fetch a list of popular cryptocurrencies to use as party themes.
Retrieve the latest prices for NFTs in the market.
Get the list of trending profiles in the crypto market.
